governing_conclusion.absent_from_HEAD_finding: BOTH v1.0 freeze docs (FROZEN 70108c11 signed; FREEZE_CANDIDATE 7b5ee09c sealed-bound) are ABSENT from the current tree; they exist only in git history at capital-'Docs/' paths. FLAG: the governing frozen gate document is not present at HEAD; recommend restoring it (byte-exact, from the sealed-bound blob) so the governing source is in-tree.
governing_conclusion.calendar_authority: sealed manifest section_8a: 'Sharadar SEP session dates (AAPL, continuously listed)'. RECONCILED: AAPL governed session index == all-prices distinct-date index within the governed window (both 3400; identical list hash b873421516ba5c4bbeb4ff3859e574f64f7251a956a2ba6ddea0e753981dad3f; 1700/850/850). The v1.0.1 seam dates/folds are therefore faithful to the authoritative AAPL calendar.
governing_conclusion.gate_battery_source: the v0.3 gate table, FROZEN UNCHANGED into v1.0 (v1.0_FROZEN signed = precedence #1; v1.0_FREEZE_CANDIDATE sealed-manifest-bound 7b5ee09c = precedence #2; gate lines IDENTICAL between the two).
governing_conclusion.my_v1.0_final_error: anchored the gate battery to v0.1 (the first table), which v0.3 materially superseded (PBO->diagnostic, DSR gate, revised annual/trade/regime concentration, +net-annualized-return, +distinct-entry-dates, cost-stress 20/300 bps, maxDD validation+OOS combined).

precedence_rule_applied: 1: a countersigned/explicitly-frozen document that supersedes earlier gate definitions
2: a sealed-manifest entry identifying the governing gate artifact + exact hash
3: a later approved correction record naming precise gate changes
4: else the last internally-complete preregistration frozen before sealed access
purpose: Determine the authoritative governing gate source for MR-002 validation/OOS by artifact census + owner precedence rule, before the v1.0.1 correction. Document/metadata read only; NO sealed data.
